'''tazhuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadsman|roadsman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-zh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadsman|roadsman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tazhuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæzhivith|tæzhivith]] || [[word:tæzhivij|tæzhivij]] || [[word:tæzhivish|tæzhivish]] || [[word:tæzhivi|tæzhivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tazhuzhuvuth|tazhuzhuvuth]] || [[word:tazhuzhuvuj|tazhuzhuvuj]] || [[word:tazhuzhuvush|tazhuzhuvush]] || [[word:tazhuzhuvu|tazhuzhuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tazhuvuth|tazhuvuth]] || [[word:tazhuvuj|tazhuvuj]] || [[word:tazhuvush|tazhuvush]] || [[word:tazhuvu|tazhuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tazhufvuth|tazhufvuth]] || [[word:tazhufvuj|tazhufvuj]] || [[word:tazhufvush|tazhufvush]] || [[word:tazhufvuf|tazhufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tazhuvuthu|tazhuvuthu]] || [[word:tazhuvuju|tazhuvuju]] || [[word:tazhuvushu|tazhuvushu]] || [[word:tazhuvuku|tazhuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tazhuvuth|tazhuvuth]] || [[word:tazhuvuj|tazhuvuj]] || [[word:tazhuvush|tazhuvush]] || [[word:tazhuvu|tazhuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tazhuvuthul|tazhuvuthul]] || [[word:tazhuvujul|tazhuvujul]] || [[word:tazhuvushul|tazhuvushul]] || [[word:tazhuvukul|tazhuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tazhuvuthuthu|tazhuvuthuthu]] || [[word:tazhuvujuju|tazhuvujuju]] || [[word:tazhuvushushu|tazhuvushushu]] || [[word:tazhuvuku|tazhuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tazhuvuthun|tazhuvuthun]] || [[word:tazhuvujun|tazhuvujun]] || [[word:tazhuvushun|tazhuvushun]] || [[word:tazhuvukun|tazhuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tazhuvuthuoro|tazhuvuthuoro]] || [[word:tazhuvujuoro|tazhuvujuoro]] || [[word:tazhuvushuoro|tazhuvushuoro]] || [[word:tazhuvukuoro|tazhuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
